workflow.desc: Mobile Code Review - Reviews mobile app implementation against design documents

field.name: design_doc_path
field.desc: Path to mobile module design document

field.name: source_root
field.desc: Root directory of mobile source code

block.field: NEVER modify source code files - read-only operation
Do NOT attempt to fix issues - only document them
PARTIAL/FAIL results MUST include specific Re-dispatch Guidance
Skip items already marked as passed in previous review
Verify all required parameters provided
Report error and stop
- Module Overview - Page/Component Structure - Native Features - Offline Support requirements
Completed Files, Implementation Status, Known Issues
API contract not provided - skipping API validation

- Pages: pages/**/* or screens/**/* (e.g., pages/user/index.vue) - Components: components/**/* (e.g., components/UserCard.vue) - Store: store/**/* (e.g., store/user.js) - API: api/**/* or services/**/* (e.g., api/user.js) - Utils: utils/**/* (e.g., utils/permission.js) - Native Modules: native/**/* or plugins/**/* (e.g., native/bridge.js)
Use Glob to scan for implemented files
Generate completeness matrix and percentage

- Platform Components: Uses correct platform-specific components - Severity: ERROR - Component Reuse: Components appropriately reusable - Severity: WARN - Native Component Usage: Proper use of native UI components - Severity: WARN

- iOS/Android Differences: Platform-specific differences handled - Severity: ERROR - Screen Adaptation: Different screen sizes handled - Severity: ERROR - Safe Area: Safe area insets respected - Severity: ERROR - Platform APIs: Platform-specific APIs correctly used - Severity: WARN

- Runtime Permissions: Runtime permission requests implemented - Severity: ERROR - Permission Rationale: User-friendly permission explanations - Severity: WARN - Denial Handling: Graceful handling of permission denial - Severity: ERROR

- Local Storage: Data caching implemented where required - Severity: ERROR - Sync Mechanism: Offline data sync strategy implemented - Severity: ERROR - Network State: Network connectivity handling - Severity: ERROR - Queue Management: Pending request queue management - Severity: WARN

- List Rendering: Virtual scrolling for long lists - Severity: ERROR - Image Optimization: Image lazy loading and caching - Severity: WARN - Memory Management: Proper cleanup of listeners/timers - Severity: ERROR - Bundle Size: Code splitting where appropriate - Severity: WARN
- PASS: 100% files created, 0 ERROR-level issues - PARTIAL: 70-99% files created, or non-critical ERROR issues - FAIL: <70% files created, or critical blockers present
templates/REVIEW-REPORT-TEMPLATE.md
speccrew-workspace/iterations/{number}-{type}-{name}/04.development/{platform_id}/[module]-review-report.md
